ability: 你不知道你是德拉克斯。你以为你是一个镇民角色，但其实你不是。一名玩家知道你是谁，如果他“疯狂”地证明你是德拉克斯，他可能被处决。
firstNightReminder: Mark a player '得知s', then wake them. Point to the Drax player. Show the THIS PLAYER IS card, then point to the Drax on the sheet.
flavor: I've mastered the ability of standing so incredibly still, that I become invisible to the eye. Watch.
